data.name: 24 Lustful Hours
data.detailed_description:
24 Lustful Hours is a cinematic adult visual novel following Max White—a newly funded startup founder—through one intense, erotic, and emotionally volatile day that will change his life forever.


After months of grinding work, Max finally gets the investment that puts his real estate software on the map. A vacation with his wife Jenny to a private island resort is supposed to be a celebration, a chance to reconnect. But when an ill-timed business call interrupts their first intimate moment, the tension between them explodes—and Max storms off alone, unknowingly setting off a chain of encounters, revelations, and temptations he never saw coming.



Across sunlit beaches, quiet cafés, hidden rooftops, spas, gyms, bars, and dark alleys, Max meets a cast of unforgettable women. Some challenge him. Some comfort him. Some simply offer heat, danger, or pleasure. As the day unfolds, Max is drawn deeper into a web of lust, loyalty, corruption, and emotional reckoning with consequences far bigger than his marriage.


Features
– Over 2,500 ultra-detailed renders in native 4K
– Nearly 100 animated sex scenes, each fully voiced by action and expression
– 25,000+ words of character-driven story and erotic buildup
– Full-length soundtrack, scene gallery, and post-game epilogues for every major character

data.short_description: 24 Lustful Hours is a cinematic adult visual novel following Max White—a newly funded startup founder—through one intense, erotic, and emotionally volatile day that will change his life forever.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1 or newer
  • 處理器: Dual Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1GB of Video Ram
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Dual Core Processor (i5 or equivalent)
  • 顯示卡: 1GB of Video Ram
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1 or newer
  • Processor: Dual Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 1GB of Video Ram
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Dual Core Processor (i5 or equivalent)
  • Graphics: 1GB of Video Ram
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
